summary.headline: Norse Pantheon expands to 8 agents with Brokkr; Major autonomy upgrades deployed
highlights: New Brokkr agent created for Android APK builds
18 cron jobs configured (5 new proactive jobs added)
Agent autonomy upgrades for Thor, Tyr, Heimdall, Njord
Model fallback strategy implemented across all agents
Terrarium app icons and Play Store banner created

commit_list: ci: add release workflow for APK builds
feat(downloads): Add downloads page for Terrarium APK

created.name: Brokkr
created.role: Android builder - forges APKs from source

updated.name: Mimir
changes: Self-healing actions for Gateway, Hub, Thor container, VPN, disk cleanup

trading_strategies.name: XRP Market Cipher v2.1
trading_strategies.improvements: Added ADX trend strength filter, ATR volatility filter, confidence tiers for position sizing

apps.name: Terrarium
apps.work: Generated app icons via Bragi/ComfyUI, added text overlays via ImageMagick, created Play Store banner

pionex_xrp.note: Bot container running from earlier session; monitor.log shows restart attempts continuing overnight into Mar 26

openclaw: tools.exec.host set to 'gateway' for git/SDK commands
Brokkr added to agents.list with sandbox: mode off
Model aliases added: Free, DeepSeekFree, Mistral7BFree

cron_jobs.session_target_changes: Changed from 'isolated' to 'current' for file-writing jobs

key_decisions: sessionTarget policy: 'current' for file-writing, 'isolated' for security-modifying jobs
Host execution: tools.exec.host=gateway for git/SDK commands
Agent autonomy tier: Thor as 'guarded autonomy' (trades within breakers)
Learning loop: Auto-implement low-risk proposals, queue medium/high for approval
Thor uses Haiku45 as primary (fast for live trading), GLM-5 as backup
Main & Heimdall offline-capable with local fallbacks
All local agents have cloud fallback for GPU congestion
pending_items: Transition Thor to live trading (target: Apr 1)
Setup Telegram routing for Norse agents
First Android nightly build runs tonight (Mar 26, 3 AM CDT)
Resolve Pionex XRP bot restart failures
